raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "un fazzija ue Balaka Kalpeem:
Kaut man Balaks fawu Nam-
mu pilnu Selta un Sudraba
dohfu / tad ne warretu es ta
KUNGA manna Deewa Wahr-
du pahrkahpt/ darridams kahdu
masu jeb leelu Leetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu paleezzet jelle arri-
dsan scho Nakti pee mannis/ ka
man finnams tohp/ ko tas KUNGS
ar man wehl runnahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Deews pee
Bileamn Nakti/ un fazzija usto:
Ja tee Wihri nahkuschi irr tew
aizinaht/ tad zellees/ eij ar win-
neim/ bet tew buhs to Wahrdn
darriht/ ko es us tew runnaschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Bileams
agri/ un apsedloja fawu Ehseta-
Mahti/ un gahje ar teem Moa-
ba Wir+neekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ta Deewa Bahrsiba
apskaitahs/ tapehz ka winsch gah-
je/ un ta KUNGA Engelis stah-
weja us to Zeltu/ winnam par
Prettineeku/ winsch tad jahje us
fawu Ehseta-Mahti / un winna
diwi Puifchi ar winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad eeraudsija ta Ehseta-
Mahte ta KUNGA Engeli us
Zeltu stahwam/ ar plikku Soh-
binn jawā Rohkā/ un ta Ehseta-
Mahte atkahpe no Zelta/ un gah-
je us Tihrunnu / tad kuhle Bile-
ams to Ehseta-Mahti / winnu
us Zeltu greesdains.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ta KUNGA Enge-
lis stahweja us weenu Zeltinu ta
Wihna - Dahrsa / kur abbejās
Puﬀês Muhris bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu ta Ehseta-Mahti
ta KUNGA Engeli eerandsija
tad speedahs winna pee Muhra
un speede Bileama Kahju pe
Muhra/ tapehz kuhle tas winn
wehl wairak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gahje tas KUNG
Engelis wehl tahkti/un stahwe
ja tahdā schaura Weeta / ku
Zetsch ne bija atkahpt/ ne pa la-
bo/ nedā pa kreito Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu ta Ehseta-Mahti
ta KUNGA Engeli eerandsija
pakritte ta appafsch Bileamu
un Bileama Dufniba apska-
tahs/ un winsch kuhle to Ehseta-
Mahti ar weenu Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atwehre tas KUNG
tai Ehseta-Mahtei to Mutti/
ta fazzija us Bileamnu: Ko efu-
es tew darrijuﬁ? ka tu mann
trihs Reisas efﬁ kuhlis?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Bileams
to Ehseta-Mahti: Tapehz ka
mann efﬁ apfinehjusi/ kant bu-
tu Sohbins mannā Rohkā /
gribbetu tew nokaut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija ta Ehseta-
Mahte us Bileamnu: Neggi
efinu tawa Ehseta-Mahte bi-
si? us ko tu efﬁ jahjis lihds fe-
Deenai? efinu es arridsan eer-
dusi tew ta darriht? Winisch
fiia: ne.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atwehre tas KUNG
Bileamam tahs Azzis/ ka win-
ta KUNGA Engeli eeraud
us Zeltu stahwam/ar plikku S-
binn fawa Rohkā / tapehz ka-
nij
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
